name: NUTTER-XMD
description: NUTTER-XMD — A powerful WhatsApp multi-device bot. Deploy your own instance.

SESSION_ID.description: Your NUTTER-XMD session ID. Get this from the pairing page on the owner's website.

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number in international format — no spaces, no + (e.g. 254712345678). Only this number can use owner commands.

PREFIX.description: Command trigger character. Default is a dot (.)

BOT_MODE.description: public = anyone can use commands. private = only OWNER_NUMBER gets responses.

AUTO_VIEW_STATUS.description: Auto-view (mark as seen) every status update the bot receives. true or false.

AUTO_LIKE_STATUS.description: Auto-react with an emoji to every status update the bot receives. true or false.

STATUS_LIKE_EMOJI.description: Emoji(s) used when auto-liking statuses. Comma-separate multiple for random picks (e.g. ❤️,🔥,😍).

ANTI_LINK.description: Default antilink setting for all groups. true = block links, false = allow. Can be overridden per group with .antilink on/off.

ANTI_BAD_WORD.description: Default antibadword setting for all groups. true = filter bad words. Can be overridden per group with .antibadword on/off.

ANTI_MENTION.description: Default antimention setting for all groups. true = block mass mentions (5+). Can be overridden per group with .antimention on/off.
